value.description: The URL or text to share/copy.

title.description: Human-readable title for the share card.

copiedLabel.description: Label shown after a successful copy.

confirmDuration.description: Duration in ms to show the copied confirmation state.

unsupportedProps.name: actions
unsupportedProps.description: Explicit actions to show. When omitted, default copy + native-share actions render.

unsupportedProps.name: preview
unsupportedProps.description: Preview content slot rendered above the actions.
